Gather Shadows  

Description

1: Invisibility

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 35 Skill: Divination
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Self
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You gather shadows about you.
Cast on other: Soandso steps into the shadows and disappears.
Effect Fades: Your shadows fade.

Game Description

Calls shadows to conceal your body, allowing you to move undetected by many creatures for up to 20.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Blood Ember Bracer
  • Brigandine Tunic
  • Circlet of Shadow [pre-nerf]
  • Circlet of Shadows
  • Cloak of Imperception
  • Crystal Mask
  • Darkened Brigandine Tunic
  • Fabled Incarnadine Breastplate
  • Incarnadine Breastplate
  • Manacle of Disruption
  • Mantle of Stealth
  • Opaline Charm
  • Ring of Shadows
  • Ring of Stealthy Travel
  • Shrouds of Earthen Shadow
  • Spell: Gather Shadows
  • Spell: Gather Shadows [Necromancer]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Gather Shadows
Spell: Gather Shadows
ClassLevel
NEC7
SHD30
Expansion:

Duration:
20.0 mins
  • Comments (12)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (20)

  • Reaver Uledrith - 9sp

  • Gyrna Porrin - 8gp 3sp 9cp

The Rathe Mountains

Maybe higher versions of the spell work better, but Gather Shadows drops if something even looks in your direction - or at least it seems to

What the Heck??
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2007 at 1:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759219118
4 posts
My shadownight just bought this spell in Cresent Reach and found that it was only for Necro's. She went to Plane of Knowledge and got the same spell that was for both Shadownights and Necro's. Although the one in Cresent Reach was only 1P where the POK one was around 3p.
▲ Page top
invis
QuoteReply
# May 27 2004 at 2:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592261057247
20 posts
Congratz, fellow SK, because you have dinged 30. This spell is a must, it is one of the reasons that you pick an SK over a warrior anyday. If you feel like sneaking past some huge number of guards, this is your spell. Get it if you are a darkie especially.

Antiholy Nogod of The Nameless server

Heretic Edalith sells this as well.
she is on the bottom floor of the library with the other Necromancer and Shadowknight spell vendors..

# Mar 10 2003 at 12:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768519780
69 posts
This spell will make you invisable to mobs that are alive and cannot see through invis spells. This will be your main invis spell till high levels.
▲ Page top
sk use of this spell

# Jan 09 2003 at 1:26 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256405593
158 posts
For sks circlet of shadows has dropped on my server at least to 300-500 pp and i suggest that you use this inventory clickable at 22 item and just keep the spell at back of book for crs. wish it was that cheap when i was a midget
